creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
2006/10/29, Jarrod Sayers <jarrod@netleader.com.au>:
> I submitted a PR to upgrade Nagios Plugins to 1.4.4 but it will be a
> while before its committed as the ports tree is frozen for the
> release of FreeBSD 6.2.  Before we investigate further, I would like
> to see what the state of this error is under 1.4.4 as there appears
> to be quite a few fixes to check_disk there.

I've checked nagios-plugins-1.4.4,1 from recent ports. The problem is fixed.

-- 
tut
DaRK VoIP GuRU
